title: PAU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website Punjab Agricultural University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website Punjab Agricultural University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Horticulture/ B.Sc. Agriculture/ B.Sc Agriculture (Hons.)/ B.sc Biotechnology (Hons.) 4years/ B. Tech Biotechnology
qualification.details: B.Sc. Horticulture/ B.Sc. Agriculture/ B.Sc Agriculture (Hons.)/ B.sc Biotechnology (Hons.) 4years/ B. Tech Biotechnology (Hons.) 4 years with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% Marks. Master's degree in Fruit Science with at least 60% marks at Master's level or OCPA of 6.50/10.00 at Master's level. Matric level certificate of Punjabi language from Punjab school Education Board or any other recognized board (as first or second language).

salary_details.details: Rs 35,000/- p.m for M.Sc. or Rs 40,000/- pm for Ph.D (fixed)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PAU Research Assistant post is 19th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Sc. in Horticulture, Agriculture, Agriculture (Hons.), Biotechnology (Hons.), or B.Tech Biotechnology (Hons.) with a minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks, along with a Master's degree in Fruit Science with at least 60% marks or OCPA of 6.50/10.00. A Punjabi language certificate at Matric level is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Research Assistant position is Rs. 35,000/- per month for M.Sc. holders and Rs. 40,000/- per month for Ph.D. holders, on a fixed basis.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant post at Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant role will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the PAU Research Assistant application?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 200/- for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F.S/SA /2025/1973-2039.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Punjab Agricultural University located?
faq.answer: Punjab Agricultural University is located in Ludhiana, Punjab.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Research Assistant position is contractual.
